TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Antigua and Barbuda hya' ga cyux maki' tay 17 03 N, 61 48 W na cung-Meco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 442.6 sq km (maki' tay 201ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 442.6 sq km, kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 0 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 93,581. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 20.50%, lhlahuy hya' ga 22.30%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 57.20%. Angtika ru Paputa, nanu yasa Angpa son nha raral, qalang qani ga. maki cyalpihay ru Tasiyang na ska, kocitayma ga AG. Angtika ru Paputa ga spiyang maki rhyal ska bsilung, maki cikay cipoq na bsilung nya uzi. sazing qalang qani ga maki cinbwanan ga cipoq balay squilq nya, 2016 kawas ga 10.10 mong nanak squilq nya. ego skayal nha, snhyang nha ga cyorokay. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Saint John's. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 1 na tay mawpuw qutux byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Elizabeth II, aring ryax tay 6 squ byacing tay 2 sa kawas 1952 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. kkian angtika ru Paputa ga maki beh syaw na bislung, labang nya ga (281 平方公里). rroq rhyal nya. te sazing lga Paputa (161 平方公里), rroq balay rhyal nha. wagiq balay ga (Mount Obama) 歐巴馬峰, hay pa ga 402 米, mkilux balay kayal nya, 氣溫 ga 27 度, mqwalax na qsya ga 1100 毫米. ggalan pila Antika ru Paputa spiyang galan thang ga zyaw na Lyoko. trang 2000 kawas lga yaqeh cyogun la. ungat squilq mwah mzwi' maki cikay koba' nya. baq kmalay tapang,手工藝品,kikay na lenki. qutux squilq Amirika Ellen 斯坦 lalu nya. yeqeh na htuw zyaw qani lga, myaqeh kwara zyuwawa na ginko la. khmaya na squilq rarang squilq ga 黑奴後代. maki cikay oco squilq, spiyang na squilq ga 英國人 ru 葡萄牙人. hga ga snhi cyorokya kwara. gaga',smlokah lahuy na snhyan 文化,體育與宗教 gaga' na Antika ru Papuya tm'nga 英國 ru 非洲 koka na mari ga pang cyo. 2007 kawas piyang pslyaq pang cyo cinbwanan 盃. kahal mari,qasu sqasay na smalah la. qutux kawas spat byacing maki sqani sqas sqasay.qutux qutux ryax mita ta sinbun. ru . 77% na squilq ga snhi cyorokay kwara, cipoq na squilq ga (17.6%) snhi 英國國教. zyaw na hetay Angtika ru Paputa smsun zywaw pklahang (Antigua and Barbuda Defence Force; ABDF), i Angtika ru Paputa na zyaw hetay rngu', 常備兵 maki qutux kbhul pitu pgal squilq, 預備兵 maki pitu paga magal squilq, yasa ga spiyang cipoq balay cinbwanan na zyaw na hetay. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA 外交部
S.PHON: antiɣua an* βarβu*a ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨjux makiʔ taj ** ** n, ** ** w na ʦ~ʨuŋ-meʦ~ʨo s~ɕjuw. kwaraʔ kiŋħʦ~ʨijan nijaʔ ***.* s~ɕq km (makiʔ taj ***ɣinkɣan kin waħʦ~ʨiʔ) (kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ nijaʔ ɣa ***.* s~ɕq km, kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ na laws~ɕajan ws~ɕiluŋ ħjaʔ ɣa * s~ɕq km) kinkħmajan kwaraʔ s~ɕquliq ħjaʔ ɣa **,***. pinβʦ~ʨjan naħaʔ s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ rħzjal ħjaʔ ij pqmaħun ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%, lħlaħuj ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%, s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ s~ɕa pptzjuwaw s~ɕa βzinaħ ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%. aŋtika ru paputa, nanu jas~ɕa aŋpa s~ɕon nħa raral, qalaŋ qani ɣa. maki ʦ~ʨjalpiħaj ru tas~ɕijaŋ na s~ɕka, koʦ~ʨitajma ɣa aɣ. aŋtika ru paputa ɣa s~ɕpijaŋ maki rħjal s~ɕka βs~ɕiluŋ, maki ʦ~ʨikaj ʦ~ʨipoq na βs~ɕiluŋ nja uzi. s~ɕaziŋ qalaŋ qani ɣa maki ʦ~ʨinβwanan ɣa ʦ~ʨipoq βalaj s~ɕquilq nja, **** kawas~ɕ ɣa **.** moŋ nanak s~ɕquilq nja. eɣo s~ɕkajal nħa, s~ɕnħjaŋ nħa ɣa ʦ~ʨjorokaj. s~ɕpzjaŋ qalaŋ na kokkaʔ s~ɕpzjaŋ naħaʔ kraħuʔ qalaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕaint *oħnʔs~ɕ. s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa * na taj mawpuw qutux βjaʦ~ʨiŋ na qutux kawas~ɕ. mrħuw kokkaʔ mrħuw kokkaʔ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa elizaβetħ ii, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. kkian aŋtika ru paputa ɣa maki βeħ s~ɕjaw na βis~ɕluŋ, laβaŋ nja ɣa (*** ****). rroq rħjal nja. te s~ɕaziŋ lɣa paputa (*** ****), rroq βalaj rħjal nħa. waɣiq βalaj ɣa (mount oβama) ****, ħaj pa ɣa *** *, mkilux βalaj kajal nja, ** ɣa ** *, mqwalax na qs~ɕja ɣa **** **. ɣɣalan pila antika ru paputa s~ɕpijaŋ ɣalan tħaŋ ɣa zjaw na ljoko. traŋ **** kawas~ɕ lɣa jaqeħ ʦ~ʨjoɣun la. uŋat s~ɕquilq mwaħ mzwiʔ maki ʦ~ʨikaj koβaʔ nja. βaq kmalaj tapaŋ,****,kikaj na lenki. qutux s~ɕquilq amirika ellen ** lalu nja. jeqeħ na ħtuw zjaw qani lɣa, mjaqeħ kwara zjuwawa na ɣinko la. kħmaja na s~ɕquilq raraŋ s~ɕquilq ɣa ****. maki ʦ~ʨikaj oʦ~ʨo s~ɕquilq, s~ɕpijaŋ na s~ɕquilq ɣa *** ru ****. ħɣa ɣa s~ɕnħi ʦ~ʨjorokja kwara. ɣaɣaʔ,s~ɕmlokaħ laħuj na s~ɕnħjan **,***** ɣaɣaʔ na antika ru papuja tmʔŋa ** ru ** koka na mari ɣa paŋ ʦ~ʨjo. **** kawas~ɕ pijaŋ ps~ɕljaq paŋ ʦ~ʨjo ʦ~ʨinβwanan *. kaħal mari,qas~ɕu s~ɕqas~ɕaj na s~ɕmalaħ la. qutux kawas~ɕ s~ɕpat βjaʦ~ʨiŋ maki s~ɕqani s~ɕqas~ɕ s~ɕqas~ɕaj.qutux qutux rjax mita ta s~ɕinβun. ru . **% na s~ɕquilq ɣa s~ɕnħi ʦ~ʨjorokaj kwara, ʦ~ʨipoq na s~ɕquilq ɣa (**.*%) s~ɕnħi ****. zjaw na ħetaj aŋtika ru paputa s~ɕms~ɕun zjwaw pklaħaŋ (antiɣua an* βarβu*a *e*enʦ~ʨe *orʦ~ʨe; aβ**), i aŋtika ru paputa na zjaw ħetaj rŋuʔ, *** maki qutux kβħul pitu pɣal s~ɕquilq, *** maki pitu paɣa maɣal s~ɕquilq, jas~ɕa ɣa s~ɕpijaŋ ʦ~ʨipoq βalaj ʦ~ʨinβwanan na zjaw na ħetaj. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ʦ~ʨia ***
S.FORM: Antigua and Barbuda hya' ga cyux maki' tay 17 03 N, 61 48 W na cung-Meco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 442.6 sq km (maki' tay 201ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 442.6 sq km, kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 0 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 93,581. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 20.50%, lhlahuy hya' ga 22.30%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 57.20%. Angtika ru Paputa, nanu yasa Angpa son nha raral, qalang qani ga. maki cyalpihay ru Tasiyang na ska, kocitayma ga AG. Angtika ru Paputa ga spiyang maki rhyal ska bsilung, maki cikay cipoq na bsilung nya uzi. sazing qalang qani ga maki cinbwanan ga cipoq balay squilq nya, 2016 kawas ga 10.10 mong nanak squilq nya. ego skayal nha, snhyang nha ga cyorokay. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Saint John's. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 1 na tay mawpuw qutux byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Elizabeth II, aring ryax tay 6 squ byacing tay 2 sa kawas 1952 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. kkian angtika ru Paputa ga maki beh syaw na bislung, labang nya ga (281 平方公里). rroq rhyal nya. te sazing lga Paputa (161 平方公里), rroq balay rhyal nha. wagiq balay ga (Mount Obama) 歐巴馬峰, hay pa ga 402 米, mkilux balay kayal nya, 氣溫 ga 27 度, mqwalax na qsya ga 1100 毫米. ggalan pila Antika ru Paputa spiyang galan thang ga zyaw na Lyoko. trang 2000 kawas lga yaqeh cyogun la. ungat squilq mwah mzwi' maki cikay koba' nya. baq kmalay tapang,手工藝品,kikay na lenki. qutux squilq Amirika Ellen 斯坦 lalu nya. yeqeh na htuw zyaw qani lga, myaqeh kwara zyuwawa na ginko la. khmaya na squilq rarang squilq ga 黑奴後代. maki cikay oco squilq, spiyang na squilq ga 英國人 ru 葡萄牙人. hga ga snhi cyorokya kwara. gaga',smlokah lahuy na snhyan 文化,體育與宗教 gaga' na Antika ru Papuya tm'nga 英國 ru 非洲 koka na mari ga pang cyo. 2007 kawas piyang pslyaq pang cyo cinbwanan 盃. kahal mari,qasu sqasay na smalah la. qutux kawas spat byacing maki sqani sqas sqasay.qutux qutux ryax mita ta sinbun. ru . 77% na squilq ga snhi cyorokay kwara, cipoq na squilq ga (17.6%) snhi 英國國教. zyaw na hetay Angtika ru Paputa smsun zywaw pklahang (Antigua and Barbuda Defence Force; ABDF), i Angtika ru Paputa na zyaw hetay rngu', 常備兵 maki qutux kbhul pitu pgal squilq, 預備兵 maki pitu paga magal squilq, yasa ga spiyang cipoq balay cinbwanan na zyaw na hetay. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA 外交部

km, kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ na laws~ɕajan ws~ɕiluŋ ħjaʔ ɣa * s~ɕq km) kinkħmajan kwaraʔ s~ɕquliq ħjaʔ ɣa **,***. pinβʦ~ʨjan naħaʔ s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ rħzjal ħjaʔ ij pqmaħun ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%, lħlaħuj ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%, s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ s~ɕa pptzjuwaw s~ɕa βzinaħ ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%. aŋtika ru paputa, nanu jas~ɕa aŋpa s~ɕon nħa raral, qalaŋ qani ɣa. maki ʦ~ʨjalpiħaj ru tas~ɕijaŋ na s~ɕka, koʦ~ʨitajma ɣa aɣ. aŋtika ru paputa ɣa s~ɕpijaŋ maki rħjal s~ɕka βs~ɕiluŋ, maki ʦ~ʨikaj ʦ~ʨipoq na βs~ɕiluŋ nja uzi. s~ɕaziŋ qalaŋ qani ɣa maki ʦ~ʨinβwanan ɣa ʦ~ʨipoq βalaj s~ɕquilq nja, **** kawas~ɕ ɣa **.** moŋ nanak s~ɕquilq nja. eɣo s~ɕkajal nħa, s~ɕnħjaŋ nħa ɣa ʦ~ʨjorokaj. s~ɕpzjaŋ qalaŋ na kokkaʔ s~ɕpzjaŋ naħaʔ kraħuʔ qalaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕaint *oħnʔs~ɕ. s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa * na taj mawpuw qutux βjaʦ~ʨiŋ na qutux kawas~ɕ. mrħuw kokkaʔ mrħuw kokkaʔ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa elizaβetħ ii, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. kkian aŋtika ru paputa ɣa maki βeħ s~ɕjaw na βis~ɕluŋ, laβaŋ nja ɣa (*** ****). rroq rħjal nja. te s~ɕaziŋ lɣa paputa (*** ****), rroq βalaj rħjal nħa. waɣiq βalaj ɣa (mount oβama) ****, ħaj pa ɣa *** *, mkilux βalaj kajal nja, ** ɣa ** *, mqwalax na qs~ɕja ɣa **** **. ɣɣalan pila antika ru paputa s~ɕpijaŋ ɣalan tħaŋ ɣa zjaw na ljoko. traŋ **** kawas~ɕ lɣa jaqeħ ʦ~ʨjoɣun la. uŋat s~ɕquilq mwaħ mzwiʔ maki ʦ~ʨikaj koβaʔ nja. βaq kmalaj tapaŋ,****,kikaj na lenki. qutux s~ɕquilq amirika ellen ** lalu nja. jeqeħ na ħtuw zjaw qani lɣa, mjaqeħ kwara zjuwawa na ɣinko la. kħmaja na s~ɕquilq raraŋ s~ɕquilq ɣa ****. maki ʦ~ʨikaj oʦ~ʨo s~ɕquilq, s~ɕpijaŋ na s~ɕquilq ɣa *** ru ****. ħɣa ɣa s~ɕnħi ʦ~ʨjorokja kwara. ɣaɣaʔ,s~ɕmlokaħ laħuj na s~ɕnħjan **,***** ɣaɣaʔ na antika ru papuja tmʔŋa ** ru ** koka na mari ɣa paŋ ʦ~ʨjo. **** kawas~ɕ pijaŋ ps~ɕljaq paŋ ʦ~ʨjo ʦ~ʨinβwanan *. kaħal mari,qas~ɕu s~ɕqas~ɕaj na s~ɕmalaħ la. qutux kawas~ɕ s~ɕpat βjaʦ~ʨiŋ maki s~ɕqani s~ɕqas~ɕ s~ɕqas~ɕaj.qutux qutux rjax mita ta s~ɕinβun. ru . **% na s~ɕquilq ɣa s~ɕnħi ʦ~ʨjorokaj kwara, ʦ~ʨipoq na s~ɕquilq ɣa (**.*%) s~ɕnħi ****. zjaw na ħetaj aŋtika ru paputa s~ɕms~ɕun zjwaw pklaħaŋ (antiɣua an* βarβu*a *e*enʦ~ʨe *orʦ~ʨe; aβ**), i aŋtika ru paputa na zjaw ħetaj rŋuʔ, *** maki qutux kβħul pitu pɣal s~ɕquilq, *** maki pitu paɣa maɣal s~ɕquilq, jas~ɕa ɣa s~ɕpijaŋ ʦ~ʨipoq βalaj ʦ~ʨinβwanan na zjaw na ħetaj. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ʦ~ʨia ***
